steps.name: Kickoff initiative
steps.description: Promote drafts to active, create initiative branch

steps.name: Kickoff feature branches
steps.description: For each partition in approach, run branch.py

steps.name: Feature work (per feature)
steps.description: Task branches → implement → test → reflect → commit → push → PR (if enabled) → merge to feature

steps.name: Complete each feature
steps.description: Update index, push, open PR to initiative (if enabled), merge

steps.name: Complete initiative
steps.description: Synthesize canon, archive (registry cleanup), open PR, merge
